title: uncinia trichocarpa var. longispica
intro: Uncinia trichocarpa var. longispica, also known as Long Beaked Cotton Grass, is a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to New Zealand and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting immune system health. Long Beaked Cotton Grass can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and other health conditions.
